benefits.description: Experienced appetite suppression throughout use, though effect has diminished over time at current dose
Lost weight over the course of a year+ on Tirzepatide, but now plateaued with ~15 lbs remaining to goal

protocol_notes: Has been on Tirzepatide for over a year. Was able to maintain appetite suppression for months at a time at various doses. Currently at 7.5 mg for several months. Now experiencing a weight loss plateau, gaining and losing the same 10 lbs. Considering upping to 10 mg Tirz or switching to Retatrutide. Also aware of some users stacking Tirz with microdosed Reta.
